items.title: 6-Axis Pick & Place Cell
items.description: Vision-guided robotic cell with B&R motion control for high-speed precision assembly on a consumer-electronics line.

items.title: Smart Factory Monitoring
items.description: 200+ sensor IIoT network feeding a real-time SCADA dashboard with predictive alerts across two plants.

items.title: ESP32 Sensor & Telemetry Platform
items.description: Low-power firmware platform with edge analytics and robust data logging for 10,000+ field devices.

items.title: Inline Quality-Control Vision
items.description: Camera-based defect detection integrated into a production line, flagging faults in real time before packaging.

items.title: Hybrid Energy Controller
items.description: Solar + battery optimisation controller with predictive load balancing for a commercial microgrid.

items.title: Predictive Maintenance Platform
items.description: Vibration & current monitoring with ML models predicting equipment failure days in advance.

items.title: Custom Machine & Enclosure Design
items.description: End-to-end SolidWorks 3D design of a bespoke automation machine — frame, motion assembly, enclosures and production-ready drawings.
